**From Imagination to Immersion: The Impact of Augmented Reality Instruction on Musical Emotion Processing: An fNIRS Hyperscanning Study.** — Brain sciences (2025). PMID: 41594788. DOI: 10.3390/brainsci16010066. Score: 59. Background: This study addresses acommon challenge in music education: students' limited emotional engagement during music listening. Objectives: This study compared two teaching methods-externally guided augmented reality (AR) integration and internally generated simulation-in terms of their neural and behavioral differences in guiding students' visual mental imagery and influencing their musical affect processing.
